data.title: WTO warns Donald Trump’s tariffs will have ‘severe downside risks’ on global trade
data.description:
The World Trade Organization (WTO) has released a new forecast on the global outlook for trade, warning that the tariffs rolled out by the President Donald Trump administration have deteriorated global trade, and it warned that global trade volumes could shrink even further if suspended tariffs are reinstated. In its report, trade in goods is […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/wto-warns-trump-tariffs-have-severe-risks/

data.title: PEPE Price To Bounce 796% To New All-Time Highs In 2025? Here’s What The Chart Says
data.description:
PEPE’s price action has been relatively quiet in the past few weeks. The meme coin has been quietly going through a continued wave of selloffs amidst the volatility in the wider crypto market. However, an interesting technical analysis shows that the chart structure of PEPEUSDT is pointing to a massive move to the upside, one that could send the token soaring by as much as 796% before the end of 2025. As the broader crypto market continues to move sideways, crypto analyst MasterAnanda identified a short-term higher low forming around support levels, which could act as the launchpad for a major PEPE price breakout
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/pepe/pepe-price-to-bounce-796/

data.title: Russia Urged to Develop National Stablecoin Amid Global Payment Changes
data.description: According to Odaily, Ivan Chebeskov, head of the Digital Financial Assets Department at the Russian Ministry of Finance, has advocated for the development of a Russian stablecoin to align with the evolving global payment systems. Chebeskov highlighted the fundamental changes occurring in the global payment landscape, with several countries advancing their own digital currencies. He emphasized that Russia should not be left behind in this trend. Stablecoins, he noted, could play a significant role in international settlements, particularly when existing payment channels face restrictions. Previously, the Russian Central Bank had initiated testing of the digital ruble.

Obtained by Binance Insider from a reputable blockchain intelligence source, this privileged insight points to an imminent surge, with Bitcoin potentially climbing 8,000 points [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/whales-poised-to-trigger-4b-crypto-surge-bitcoin-and-ethereum-set-for-explosive-rally/

data.title: Russian Finance Ministry official says national stablecoin should be launched to adapt to global payment changes
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Ivan Chebeskov, head of the digital financial assets department of the Russian Ministry of Finance, said that Russia should launch its own stablecoin to adapt to the evolution of the global payment system. He pointed out that the current global payment system is undergoing fundamental changes, and many countries are developing their own digital currencies, and Russia should not be absent. He also emphasized that stablecoins can play an important role in international settlements, especially in the context of limited existing payment channels. Previously, the Central Bank of Russia has begun testing the digital ruble. (Reuters)

data.title: US and Canada launch ‘operation avalanche’ to combat $4.3M Ethereum phishing scam
data.description:
17-4-2025 – American and Canadian authorities have joined forces to tackle a sophisticated cryptocurrency theft scheme that has already claimed millions in victims’ funds. The collaborative effort, christened “Operation Avalanche”, saw the United States Secret Service working hand-in-hand with the British Columbia Securities Commission to combat an emerging threat known as “approval phishing” on the [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/us-and-canada-launch-operation-avalanche-to-combat-4-3m-ethereum-phishing-scam/
